manifest.author: Ben Roberts
manifest.description: Import issues from Gitlab into Obsidian.
manifest.name: Gitlab Issues

releases.author: benr77
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Refactored and added tests to Settings by @JonnyDeates in https://github.com/benr77/obsidian-gitlab-issues/pull/28
* Bump lodash from 4.17.21 to 4.18.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/benr77/obsidian-gitlab-issues/pull/38

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/benr77/obsidian-gitlab-issues/pull/38

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/benr77/obsidian-gitlab-issues/compare/0.1.10...0.1.11
